title: Delete the stale, unreferenced top-level frontend/ duplicate tree (R2)
acceptance_criteria: The entire top-level frontend/ directory is removed via git rm -r (it is tracked but referenced by no config or import — verified: root index.html/tsconfig/tailwind/vite all target src/frontend).

Before deleting, re-grep the repo to CONFIRM zero references to the top-level frontend/ tree (imports, configs, scripts, playwright/e2e). If ANY live reference is found, STOP and report rather than delete.
Canonical src/frontend/ is untouched. `bun run typecheck` and the build still resolve (no dangling references introduced).
No file outside the top-level frontend/ directory is modified.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation; explicit confirmation that the pre-delete reference grep came back clean
